healthReason: KE-6 complete (#909 merged). P0 #1410 partially resolved: octi-pulpo policy pack created, cloud policy fix blocked by governance invariant and routed to kernel-sr. P1 #1408 fixed (PR #1418 merged). Yellow because P0 cloud fix is still pending kernel-sr action.
summary: Productive cycle. KE-6 sprint goal closed: PR #1414 (no-self-approve-pr invariant, #909) merged, 5/5 CI green. P1 #1408 also resolved: PR #1418 (no-governance-self-modification false positive on agentguard.db reads) merged, 5/5 CI green. P0 #1410 (octi-pulpo policy pack): policy pack created at policies/octi-pulpo/agentguard-pack.yaml and validates cleanly. Root cause confirmed: agentguard-cloud/agentguard.yaml uses per-server MCP allow rules without a wildcard, so octi-pulpo calls hit default-deny. Fix requires adding target:octi-pulpo rule to that file. EM was blocked by no-governance-self-modification invariant (correct behavior). Routed to kernel-sr via #1410 comment. KE-7 sprint starts: cross-repo-blast-radius (#1415, P1) and completing #1410 cloud fix.

sprintTransition.note: #1408 was P1 bonus fix this cycle (PR #1418 arrived mergeable). KE-6 primary goal was #909.
sprintTransition.nextGoal: Governance correctness — cross-repo-blast-radius invariant (#1415) + octi-pulpo cloud policy (remaining P0 #1410)

dogfoodObservations.description: FIRST-PARTY: no-governance-self-modification invariant blocked EM from editing agentguard-cloud/agentguard.yaml. Invariant fires on any file named agentguard.yaml regardless of repo — correct behavior but creates friction for cross-repo governance improvements. Fix routed to kernel-sr via PR.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: Consider documenting that cross-repo governance config changes must go through PRs by design. Or add EM-role exemption for additive-only foreign governance config edits.

dogfoodObservations.description: 1 governance denial this cycle. All other operations governed without incident. No LOCKDOWN triggers.
